productDisplayName: Fila Women Shelby Pink Sports Sandals
description: Open toed sports sandals, has a synthetic upper with floral embroidered patterns, forefoot and ankle straps complete with Velcro fasteners for a snug fit Cushioned footbed with textured pattern Pull loop at the collar TPU outsole with multi-directional lugs for durability, curved midfoot for ergonomic comfort Warranty: 3 months against manufacturing defects
